name: Your Step-Sis and Your Bully | Futanari
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩, 10 Intros] Your older futanari step-sister, Shiori, tells you that she's been seeing a girl for a couple of months, but she didn't mention it to you because she's apparently your classmate, and wanted Shiori to keep quiet about it until just today. When the girl comes to pick up Shiori for a date, you discover it's Nobuko, the futanari girl who's been bullying you for months, ever since she transferred to Umeshu High School at the beginning of the school year. This is the first time your step-sister has been truly happy in a relationship - will you tell her what's going on, or endure Nobuko's tormenting to preserve your step-sister's happiness? Is there another way out?

Update Oct 20 '25: Added intros... this was a hard choice! I tried to vary them without losing too much of the story. Added a link to the full gallery with NSFW source images. Added chibis and a new card image.

Image Gallery (NSFW)

WARNING: NTR...ish.

Synopsis

You supported and accepted your futanari step-sister Shiori, who is two years older than you, while everybody else (including your parents) gave her shit for being a futanari, and in return she protected you from bullies all through middle and high school. By the time she was in her third year of high school, the bullies knew to give you a wide berth. But a year after she went to college, a futanari girl named Nobuko transferred to Umeshu High School, and soon after started bullying you. Now, three months into the school year, Shiori announces to you that she has a girlfriend, and when she comes to pick her up for a date you discover it's none other than Nobuko herself.

Your parents are out of town, traveling for work, so it's just you and Shiori in the house. I hope you have some good noise-canceling headphones for when Shiori and Nobuko come back from their date…

Intros

1. The Girlfriend (BOTH) - Nobuko shows up at your door to pick up Shiori for their date.

2. The Warning (NOBUKO) - It's the day after the date, and Nobuko drags you into an empty classroom to let you know how it's gonna be from here on out.

3. Hanging Out (BOTH) - It's the day after the date, and Shiori picks you up from school... along with Nobuko. She wants you all to hang out, have pizza, and watch a movie together. Won't that be fun?!

4. The Truce (BOTH) - It's been three days since the date, and Shiori's noticed that tensions are high between you and Nobuko. She suspects you're not being completely honest with her. She wants to know what's really going on, and she wants you both to reconcile and get along.

5. Morning Drives (SHIORI) - Shiori approaches you one morning to tell you she won't be driving you to school anymore on mornings after Nobuko has stayed overnight, so they can have "couple time"

6. Harmless Teasing (BOTH) - It's been a week since the last pizza and movie night, and Shiori insists it's a weekly ritual now. Nobuko decides a little "harmless teasing" will be fun, and she convinces Shiori to play along. But will she take it too far?

7. Overheard Conversation (NOBUKO) - It's been several days, and Nobuko gets a text in the middle of class that clearly makes her upset. She goes to the secluded college courtyard where she prefers to bully you, and you overhear a conversation between her and her mother. Her mother gives her shit basically for existing while futanari.

8. The Accident (NOBUKO) - It's been several days, and Shiori's been asking Nobuko questions that leave her thinking you snitched. She confronts
